lines.speaker: Peasant
lines.text: You made it out of the valley! We heard the wolves last night.

lines.speaker: Hero
lines.text: I kept to the path. The herbs are safe in my pack.

lines.speaker: Peasant
lines.text: Good. The elder will want to hear that. Rest here if you need water.

lines.speaker: Hero
lines.text: Thanks. I push on at dawn.
